handoff.lastActionSummary: Upstream harness maintenance checkpoint: script/type refactor, Codex Markdown auto-injection allowlist update, wrapper injection diagnostic plus explicit shard-block transitive injection, repository-root Codex skill wrapper paths with injection shard markers, README release/guide sharding plus package script inventory cleanup, guarded vibe-init/vibe-interview/vibe-iterate/vibe-review shard audits, Codex wrapper diagnostic fixtures and all-skill wrapper audit coverage, shared skill-shard-audit helper extraction, vibe-sprint-mode permission audit coverage, vibe-sync boundary audit coverage including a root README full-ownership guard, final Markdown injection guarantee inventory documentation, dashboard/report renderer template module split, and README/guide docs realigned with .vibe/harness runtime layout; downstream must still run /vibe-init.
